title: 1 Hour of Heraclitus: Everything Flows for Deep Sleep
description:
Sink into Heraclitus's wisdom: everything flows, and peace comes from accepting change. Fire and water teach timeless lessons.

✦ Learn "panta rhei" (everything flows) and find inner peace
✦ Explore the unity of opposites
✦ Discover fire as transformation
✦ Contemplate eternal becoming

Subscribe and hit 🔔 for new sleep stories every day.

Ambient soundscape: gentle water flows, crackling fire, ancient Ephesus evening.
